programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: The fun-filled adventures of 26 lively letters who can make invisible words in the sky come to life by holding hands.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: The fun-filled adventures of 26 lively letters who can make invisible words in the sky come to life by holding hands.

programme.title: Oddbods
programme.desc: Seven unusual characters laugh, fool and trip their way through life.

programme.title: The Drooling Detective
programme.desc: When ruthless dognappers steal Mia's dog Toffee from the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show, it's up to the Friends to play detective and track down the culprits, with the help of an unlikely hero: Stephanie's borrowed sad-sack bloodhound, Benchley. Andrea and her singing dog act, the Howlers, are a sure bet to win the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show – in spite of stiff competition from Tanya's dancing poodle, Olivia's Robo-Dog, and even Stephanie's sad-sack borrowed bloodhound, Benchley. But when an unscrupulous mother-and-son dog-napping team steals the Howlers' best singer, Mia's dog Toffee, it's up to the Friends to rescue him and catch the baddies with the help of the Hero Of The Day – Benchley!

programme.title: Pirates Vs. Ninja
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City. Sharing a tiny, one-bedroom apartment in the city, the Ninja take Lloyd to Grand Sensei Darreth's Mojo Dojo to begin training. There, they discover Lloyd has all four of their natural elemental abilities. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon discovers his Mega-Weapon can't destroy, only create what the user wishes. By accident, Garmadon brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty: Captain Soto and his Pirates, and they mutiny the ship. Answering the age-old question of who would win a fight between pirates and ninja, it's up to our ninja to stop Captain Soto and his men from plundering Ninjago City. In the end, Ninjago City is saved, the Pirates are arrested and Lord Garmadon escapes once again with their Black Bounty.

programme.title: The King's Tournament
programme.desc: Rival to the King, Jorah Tightwad thinks his knights – the Tighty Knighties – are easily better than the NEXO-Knights, so he challenges King Halbert to prove who's better during the King's Birthday Tournament. It's the King's birthday! To celebrate, the Queen and Macy always throw him a great, big birthday party consisting of a feast on birthday eve and a tournament the next day. At the birthday banquet is JORAH TIGHTWAD (last seen in episode 104.) He's goading the King (and on his birthday, even) and going on and on about how his knights are better than the NEXO-Knights. The King protests, but Jorah asks “How many magical books have your knights recovered? None, zilch, zero.” But he produces the BOOK OF ENVY, which his superior knights captured from Jestro. The next day, the NEXO-Knights square off against Tightwad's four knights: JOUSTING BEEBER, BRICKNEY SPEARS, SHIA LABLADE and THE BLOK. We see that all these knights are envious of the NEXO-Knights: their weapons, their fame, their hair, etc. Macy is also disappointed to find out she CAN'T fight in the tournament – she's agreed to be in “princess mode” for her father's birthday. During the tournament, we see that Tightwad's knights are amazing in fighting contests. They all pair-off with knights who have their same weapons skills. Tightwad makes fun of the NEXO-Knights as his knights do well. Jestro and the Book of Monsters discover that Tightwad has the Book of Envy and he and his monsters attack the tournament. Then we learn that Tightwad's knights might be good tournament fighters, but they can't handle real fights and the NEXO-Knights must save them! Macy is finally able to join in the fight when she sees Magmar show up on the flank. The NEXO-Knights successfully defend the king, but Jestro gets away with the Book of Envy. Tightwad must admit his knights never won the book from Jestro he got the book when Merlok blasted books of magic across the realm. Tightwad's knights all admit that they really admire the NEXO-Knights.

programme.title: Rabbitouille
programme.desc: It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! Stephanie concocts a fabulous cake, and Sneaky Tanya steals the recipe -- but neither knows that pet bunny Daisy has added a secret key ingredient. Will Stephanie's frantic efforts to win at all costs end her friendship with her BFF's? It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! After the duo's rivalry brings Aunt Sophie's Adopt-A-Pet Fair to a disastrous end, a contrite Stephanie wants to make amends with the prize money from a TV Bake-Off show. At home, Stephanie practices baking a delicious cake, and Tanya steals the recipe. But neither girl knows that Stephanie's pet bunny has inadvertently added a secret ingredient, ensuring that no one can repeat the recipe. A frustrated Stephanie freaks out, nearly ending her friendship with the girls – until they discover the bunny's secret and race to help Stephanie win.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly's Boarding School, they discover it's a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon's new Mega-Weapo. Realizing how to correctly wield the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates evil replicas of the Ninja to face off with our heroes. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are invited back the Darkly's Boarding School, only to discover it's a trap and now the bad kids have seized control of the school. With the Ninja trapped in the school with the faculty, things spiral out of control as the Evil Replica Ninja arrive. As an awesome battle takes place in the school halls, the Ninja manage to outsmart their evil versions, and warn Lord Garmadon they're ready for whatever else he throws at them.

programme.title: Monster Chef
programme.desc: Axl and Chef Éclair must enter a cooking contest to try to keep Jestro from getting the hottest chili recipe in the realm. Knighton celebrity chef GOBBLETON RAMBLEY announces that he's developed the hottest chili recipe ever created. Now, he intends to give the recipe to the winner of his “Hottest Chili Cook-Off Competition” cooking show on Knighton TV. He'll turn over his famous Chili Cookbook with the hottest chili recipe on the last page. It's so unique it can't be recreated without it. Jestro and the Book of Monsters think they MUST have that recipe. “Hot chili makes hot monsters!” Merlok knows that this recipe, in the wrong hands – meaning Jestro's – could be dangerous. But when the Knights appeal to the egomaniacal chef, he says the only way to get the recipe is to win it from him. So Axl and Chef Éclair decide to enter. The team that creates the hottest chili will win Rambley's cookbook. Chef Éclair is unsure that Axl has the skills to help them win the competition, but, as we see through funny cooking show bits, Axl is quite good and they become a pretty good team. (We will also learn that years ago, Rambley stole one of Éclair's best recipes and they don't like each other.) While watching the multi-part competition, Aaron and Lance have a contest of their own: who can eat the hottest chili. Axl and Éclair actually win the competition, coming up with a raging hot chili recipe. Before they can claim their prize, Jestro and his monsters attack with Magmar leading the way on his siege tower. They must get that cookbook! During the battle, Rambley's cookbook is accidentally melted. After the battle, Rambley announces his new quest: to make the sweetest ice cream ever! While Axl and Éclair cook happily in the kitchen of the Fortrex, back in the Redoubt of Ruination, Jestro and Lavaria are attempting to recreate Rambley's chili recipe. They keep spooning various recipes of chili into the Book of Monsters. “Nope, not hot enough…waaaay too much garlic….you call that hot?!” (BELCH!)

programme.title: Change Of Address
programme.desc: When Stephanie's mom leaves her in charge of their house for a few days, it's finally Stephanie's chance to prove she can handle responsibility alone. Naturally, everything that can go wrong does go wrong – especially when the entire house disappears! When Stephanie's mom leaves her in charge of their house for a few days, it's finally Stephanie's chance to prove she can handle responsibility alone. But after fending off Andrea's party plans, a Home Alone-style break-in (by the hapless Snivel, trying to retrieve incriminating evidence of the Mayor's latest scheme), and finally the entire house disappearing (“Uh, think Stephanie's Mom will notice?”), Stephanie comes to appreciate that responsibility is a lot harder than it looks.

programme.title: Ninjaball Run
programme.desc: When the ninja learn that Darreth's Mojo Dojo is to be destroyed and Darreth doesn't have the money to save it, our heroes enter the annual NinjaBall Run to win its cash prize in order to save the dojo. As Lloyd continues to train and unlock his hidden powers, the Ninja learn land developers are going to destroy Darreth's Mojo Dojo unless Darreth can find the money to save it. The Ninja decide to enter their Ninja Tank into the annual NinjaBall Run cross-country rally to try to win its cash prize. Revisiting past characters who also enter the race, the high-speed derby will only grow more dangerous as Garmadon enters his Black Bounty, realizing this is the perfect chance to use his Mega-Weapon and rid the ninja. In the end, the Ninja will discover a few secrets within their Ninja Tank, allowing them to beat Garmadon's Bounty by a millisecond and saving Darreth's Dojo with their well-deserved cash prize. And as a final surprise, the Ninja steal back the Destiny's Bounty and make it their own once again.

programme.title: Knight Out
programme.desc: When the other NEXO-Knights decide they need a vacation from Clay, they send him on a holiday not knowing that he's going to a resort that houses an evil book or that Jestro will be heading there, too. Clay needs a vacation. Or, actually, the knights need a vacation from Clay! Clay is so super-focused that sometimes they just can't take it: training, training, maintenance, the Knights' Code tests then…more training. Even Merlok 2.0 is exhausted and he has no physical form! So, the Knights send Clay off on a holiday against his will (arranged by Lance because if there's one thing he can do it's plan a vacation.) But unbeknownst to the other Knights, Jestro and the Book of Monsters are tracking an evil book. A book that they suspect is located near the resort “Exalted Towers” renowned for its exquisite service, where Clay is staying. It's the BOOK OF CRUELTY and Clay notices that it's affecting the “high class” resort where Lance has booked him: the service is terrible, the staff is nasty, and everyone seems to take joy in being cruel to him (and to each other.) Meanwhile, the other Knights are having a terrible time because they realize that Clay takes charge of the basic maintenance of almost everything in the Fortrex. Stuff starts breaking down, chores are not getting done and everyone is getting on each other's nerves. Clay senses things are “off” at the resort, and discovers the book they've been using as the guest register is really the Book of Cruelty. As Clay scoops it up, he looks outside to see…Jestro and his monsters arrive on the Evilmobile. Clay battles as best he can on his own by setting traps and being cunning but he's finally caught. Just when it looks like this will be the cruelest vacation ever the other Knights arrive on their vehicles! They spring into action, free Clay, and battle and defeat Jestro and the monsters – though Jestro escapes. The Knights make Clay promise to never go on vacation again.

programme.title: Dive In
programme.desc: Working summer jobs at the new Heartlake City Pool, Restaurant and Sports Center is fun and games for the Friends – until singing mermaid Andrea gets her very first teenage crush. The Friends each try to help, with disastrous results. Working summer jobs at the new Heartlake City Pool, Restaurant and Sports Center is fun and games for the Friends – until singing mermaid Andrea gets her very first teenage crush. He's Tad, the new lifeguard, and just the sight of him reduces the normally fearless Andrea to a babbling wimp. The Friends all try to help her out, with less-than stellar results, each attempt resulting in increasing mayhem for Tad until he's terrified of Andrea. Then Andrea discovers that she's been mooning over the wrong boy all along!

programme.title: Child's Play
programme.desc: When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and turned into kids and are now forced to enlist Lloyd's help to battle the awakened monster. Tired of intense training, Lloyd yearns to play and enjoy his youth. The Ninja remind Lloyd that along with great power, comes great responsibility. When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and soon discover they've been turned into kids! Seeking Lloyd's help and relying on childhood antics, the five ninja kids must destroy the reawakened monster that's hunting them in the city. In the end, Lloyd makes the difficult decision and sacrifices his youth in order to save them from the beast, turning forward the clock and turning Lloyd into a young man. Sensei Wu fears now that since Lloyd is young man, the final battle of good versus evil approaches sooner than he had ever expected.

programme.title: Saturday Knight Fever
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters catching a cold means trouble for the NEXO-Knights when he can create an entirely new kind of “snotty” monster. King and Queen Halbert have journeyed to the town of Cleanington to open the brand new Scrubbery Barn at the invitation of Roger the Scrubber (seen in 104.) Meanwhile, the Book of Monsters drags Jestro to Snottingham – one of the coldest places in Knighton where everyone coughs, has a runny nose and is generally under-the-weather. The BOM demands that Jestro feed him a “snotheiser” ball which will probably make him sick. The BOM explains that if he is sick, he may just produce a whole new breed of magical monsters … some that the knights would NEVER expect. The BOM gets sick and starts coughing up phlegm globlins and bloblins. The Knights arrive, alerted to what they think is an attack on the town by Snottingham's mayor, Hack Coughmeier. The sickened, sneezy, snotty monsters infect the knights and, more importantly, the knights' NEXO-Shields. Now their NEXO-Powers are infected. As they try to download something to fight the monsters, they realize the powers they get are off strange, infected versions of their powers. The knights drive Jestro and his snot monsters off and they turn in for the night. And, overnight, they all get sick. Meanwhile, the BOM order a nice, hot lava bath…he'll feel fine by morning. But the knights wake-up with colds and they feel terrible. Ava and Merlok 2.0 thinks it will pass in a day or two…it's just a typical Snottingham cold. Each knight gets sick in their own funny way and their illnesses play right into Jestro and the BOM's hands: they're headed to Cleanington to kidnap the king! The citizens of the ultra-clean city hate the sight of monsters, but then feel caught in between when the sick, sneezy, snotty knights arrive on their Fortrex. The fight goes terribly for the knights. They try to download the Nexo-power “Glorious Griffon” but instead get just feathers. So they improvise and tickle the monsters! Ava finally comes up with a way to use some anti-virus tools on their NEXO-Shields and just as Jestro is about to take the king and queen away, the NEXO-Knights get their normal powers back! They defeat Jestro and save the king and queen.

programme.title: I Told You So
programme.desc: Confined to a wheelchair after a failed Halloween attempt to prove herself a reporter, What's At Heart photographer Emma sees strange goings-on through her hospital window. She's convinced the neighbors are jewel thieves, but no one believes her – till the bad guys come after her! To show her Friends on the What's At Heart school paper that she's more than just a photographer, Emma investigates a scary old house on Halloween eve -- only to take a tumble and land in the hospital. There, confined to a wheelchair, she observes mysterious goings-on through her window which convince her that the neighbors are jewel thieves. Her friends, though dubious, agree to check it out. But after nearly getting caught by the neighbors, they come up empty and decide it's all just Emma's imagination. Meanwhile, up in Maternity, Sophie's having a baby! The girls run out, leaving Emma alone. And that's when the bad guys decide to pay Emma a visit…

programme.title: Wrong Place, Wrong Time
programme.desc: When Garmadon travels back in time in order to undo the past and rid the Ninja from the future, the Ninja follow him and try to stop him by using the Golden Weapons from the past to clash against Garmadon's Mega-Weapon. In his most villainous attempt at using the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates a vortex through space and time to return to the moment Wu first arrives to recruit Kai to become a ninja (Episode 1, 2011) in order to rid the ninja from the future. The Ninja follow him back in time, only to make the mistake in saving Nya from the Skeletons. Suddenly, Past Kai doesn't have a need to become a ninja, so our current day heroes must fix the past to save their futures. The stakes rise as Garmadon catches wind the Ninja have followed him back in time and plans a dangerous trap. In a final battle, the ninja use the Golden Weapons from the past to clash against Garmadon's Mega-Weapon, causing all of the legendary weapons to shoot off into the night sky. In the end, our heroes return back to the present and learn the Mega-Weapon has ceased to exist because it was destroyed in the past, leaving them all without their elemental powers.

programme.title: Open Mike Knight
programme.desc: The Book of Betrayal leads Jestro and his Monsters to Funnyton – the funnies town in the kingdom. When they Knights arrive to capture him, they discover (to their shock) that Jestro and the Book of Monsters are now the town's top comedians! Jestro and his monsters are in attack formation moving to pillage the town of Funnyton. But when they arrive, ready to tear into the place, they see that nobody's in town. Then, they hear…laughter?! The entire town is there listening to a stand-up comic JOKES KNIGHTLY. He's hilarious. He commands such power, such attention, and such loyalty. Jestro and the BOM decide they must become funny. They order all kinds of book on comedy from Spamazon: books on parody, irony, insult humor, slapstick, satire, knock-knock jokes, elephant jokes, “my monster is so fat” jokes, etc. They work-up a ventriloquist act with the BOM sitting on Jestro's lap. They start doing their act and, surprisingly, they're funny. They're very funny. The Fortrex arrives and the knights rush out, ready for battle. They fight through a string of monsters just outside the town, but discover they're only working as “bouncers” to keep too many people out of the comedy club. (“Sorry, you guys aren't on the list.”) The knights hear loud laughs and head there. In the club, they discover the town isn't being held hostage, they're in the show voluntarily having a great time. And…Jestro and the BOM are funny. Meanwhile, during the show, Jokes Knightly decides he'll steal the BOM and Jestro's act. During the intermission at the comedy show, Clay comes backstage to talk to Jestro. Maybe, Clay says, this shows that Jestro doesn't have to be bad…he is funny, like Clay always said he was. Meanwhile, Jokes Knightly steals the BOM and Jestro can't find it. He panics. Clay encourages him…go on stage alone, be funny…he can do it! Jestro goes out and is funny on his own he hits all his punchlines, he gets big laughs he starts to see that Clay is right. The BOM sees that Jokes Knightly has a “joke book” that turns out to be the BOOK OF BETRAYAL. That's how Mike Knight has become so funny – by stealing everyone's material! BOM calls in Magmar, who saves him from Mike Knight AND takes the Book of Betrayal. As Jestro comes off-stage to great applause, the BOM tells him they have the Book of Betrayal. The BOM calls in Magmar and his monsters and they start a fight as Clay comes to Jestro's defense and calls on the other Knights for backup. A big battle ensues that destroys the comedy club in Funnyton. The Knights win and drive-off Magmar, the monsters and the BOM. As they retreat, the BOM looks around: “Where's my Jestro?!” Jestro sneaked away during the fight and is in a nearby forest with…the Book of Betrayal.

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: The Stone Army
programme.desc: The ninja face off with an exhibit of a Stone Samurai Warrior that the toxic venom from the Great Devourer has brought to life while Garmadon manages to find a fabled Dark Island that is said to hold dark powers. Lord Garmadon struggles controlling the Serpentine now that he is without the Mega-Weapon. His latest endeavor is to lead the snakes in search of a fabled Dark Island that ancient texts say holds dark powers. Unable to find the island, the furious Serpentine abandon Lord Garmadon out at sea. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are called to the museum to find the toxic venom from the Great Devourer has seeped into the ground beneath the city, and it's brought an exhibit of a Stone Samurai Warrior to life! Our heroes come across Misako, Lloyd's long lost mother. She's an archeologist in search of stopping the prophesized battle between Lloyd and his father. She had unearthed the Stone Warrior, and shares how it was once part of an indestructible army created by a dark spirit named The Overlord. When the balance is altered and evil is let into Ninjago, it will allow the Overlord to return and bring darkness and destruction to the land. Unable to destroy the Terminator-like Stone Warrior, the Ninja cleverly trap it. In the end, Lord Garmadon awakens on a small island at sea and hears the voice of the banished Overlord, promising him his wildest dreams. Garmadon uses his four hands to activate a mechanism, raising a lost land from out of the sea, creating a Yin/Yang symbol with Ninjago. The ultimate battle between good and evil begins to unfold.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic turns detective to solve the mystery of his missing Red Sneakers--and just in time to get them back and stop Dr. Robotnik's latest attack on a peaceful Mobius village.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails adopts a cute and fuzzy pet named Walter who turns out to be a black hole who sucks up everything in Mobius. Realizing that Walter is from another dimension our heroes have to return him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Mobius is suffering a crime spree and all the evidence points to Sonic as the culprit. But the real thief is a lab rat wearing a high-tech vehicle suit who was sent by Robotnik to discredit our hero.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Hacker, an adolescent mole computer whiz steals a super-intelligence program from Robotnik's computer, Sonic has to protect him, smashing Grounder to pieces.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic leaves Tails in charge of protecting a squirrel village food supply, when he zips off to stop a dam from breaking. Robotnik sends Scratch and Grounder after Tails.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik installs a new "obedience microchip" in Scratch and Grounder and orders them to drill for a rare mineral in a tropical mountain. With his Freezomatic machine, Robotnik covers the mountain in ice and runs a Hermit out of his home.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik launches a spy-orb that will uncover the Freedom Fighter's Knothole location, Sonic and Robot launch themselves up to the orbiting spy-sphere aboard a home-made rocket powered by Robotnik's discarded booster engine.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails brings a new friend home to Knothole - a baby Terra-Pod who has strayed from the herd that is currently migrating. Sonic, Sally, and some of the other Freedom Fighters return the Baby-T to its mom and the rest of the herd.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and The Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's underground air base in a mission to reprogram the launch data on Robotnik's fleet of Stealth-Bot aircraft. While attempting to reprogram the Stealth-Bot computer system.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a "race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: In Part II, Sonic and Sally steal the Roboti-sizer plans, stop the Destroyer from polluting the Great Forest and save Little Sonic, Little Sally and Dulcy's mother, Sabina.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: While the rest of the Shane Gang defend the perimeter from the legions of Blakk Guards sent to free Dr. Blakk from prison, Eli interogates the captured villain. Surprisingly, Blakk feels like talking. He reveals where he came from, how and why he discovered ghouls and most importantly of all, Eli learns the truth about what happened to his father.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli's got a new slug recruit! But in the heat of battle, can this rookie go from frightened novice to the hero of the day?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk has succeeded in creating a gap in the magical slug-energy barrier that protects Slugterra, opening the way for the evil Darkbane to tunnel their way up from the Deep Caverns. Eli and the Shane gang must stop this at any cost. Now armed with a selection of upgraded slugs, blasters and armor, they take the battle to Dr. Blakk's front door. While his team slugs it out against Dr. Blakk's minions, Eli takes on Blakk himself once and for all!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli and the Shane Gang have vanquished Dr. Blakk. But a new threat emerges from beyond the 99 caverns.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Dark Slinger and his marauders have invaded Slugterra! But there's more to this new threat than meets the eye. Eli must fight a very different kind of duel to save Slugterra...and himself.

programme.desc: To master the mysterious slug-slinging art of Slug Fu, Eli must train alone with Junjie. programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: In order to reach the Emperor of the Eastern Caverns, Eli and Junjie pose as Underlords to enter the Tournament of Underlords.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: In a climactic battle, Junjie and Eli confront the Emperor and the Dai-Fu as the fate of the entire Eastern Caverns hangs in the balance!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the Shane Gang arrive at a cavern overrun by thieves terrorizing the good townfolk, they decide to use Pronto as bait, hoping the thieves will eliminate each other as each strives to be the first to capture the valuable molenoid-the only one the Eastern Caverns have ever seen. However, their plan goes awry when Underlord Holt arrives and commands the thieves to work together to bring him Pronto-dead or alive!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the Shane Gang travel to the Auroris Mine, they discover a legendary monster carved out of stone attacking the mines-the Pyritor. programme.title: The Dark Crystal

programme.title: Sands of Iwo Jima

programme.title: Gone Baby Gone

programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's
programme.desc: Holly is a deliciously eccentric New York City playgirl determined to marry a Brazilian millionaire.

programme.title: The Duchess
programme.desc: Chronicles the life of 18th century aristrocrat Georgiana, Duchess of Devonshire, an ancestor of Princess Di.

programme.title: She's Out Of Control
programme.desc: Doug loves his daughter very much. But there's one thing about her he can't handle. She's growing up.

programme.title: Blonde Ambition
programme.desc: A young woman's unconventional, comedic journey up the corporate ladder while finding love along the way.

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married

programme.title: Guarding Tess

programme.title: The Wrecking Crew
programme.desc: Matt Helm, ICE's greatest secret agent, must retrieve one billion dollars in stolen gold before the world's economy collapses.

programme.title: All The Young Men
programme.desc: While holding position at a mountain pass during the Korean War, a platoon leader is mortally wounded and gives command to an inexperienced sergeant, angering the unit's more battle-hardened soldiers.

programme.title: The Lady From Shanghai
programme.desc: An itinerant Irishman finds trouble after a life insurance scam leaves him accused of a murder he didn't commit.

programme.title: Hook, Line And Sinker
programme.desc: Thinking he's dying, a poor schnook goes on a $100,000 spending spree only to find out he's as healthy as a horse.

programme.title: Boeing-Boeing
programme.desc: Boeing Boeing follows the lives of journalist Bernard and his friend Robert. Bernard is juggling romances with three different stewardesses but when Robert comes in for a visit and the airline carriers increase flights to Paris the comedy ensues!

programme.title: Ace in the Hole
programme.desc: A cave collapse traps a man, and all eyes turn toward the tragedy, including those of Charles "Chuck" Tatum (Kirk Douglas), a washed-up newspaper reporter who sees the incident as a ticket back to his former days at the top of the journalism heap.

programme.title: Artists and Models
programme.desc: A goonish young man receives telepathic top secret information in his nightmares, which are used by his artist friend in comic strips. Foreign agents and the CIA get interested.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: Reap the Wild Wind
programme.desc: Cut-throat salvagers who profit from the wrecks of transatlantic cargo ships move from exploiting shipwrecks to causing them.

programme.title: Brighton Beach Memoirs
programme.desc: The story of a 15-year-old boy focusing on what matters most - baseball and girls. Based on the Broadway hit.

programme.title: The Palm Beach Story
programme.desc: Money makes the world go 'round, or so Gerry believes when she divorces her husband and marries a millionaire.

programme.title: Lover Come Back
programme.desc: All is fair in love and advertising in this delightful romantic comedy of errors.

programme.title: 2nd Date Sex
programme.desc: In hopes of a better relationship this time around, Laura and Ryan are trying to navigate their dating lives. How bad can a second date get? Laura and Ryan are about to find out.

programme.title: Amy and Peter Are Getting Divorced
programme.desc: A seemingly perfect couple are considering a divorce. Their friends are stunned and put everything in place to prevent the breakup of the model couple

programme.title: Daffodils
programme.desc: Leaving her dying father to perform a gig, Maisie explores her parents' heartfelt love and how it all devastatingly fell apart. Told through Maisie's eyes, the love story is expressed with re-imaginings of iconic New Zealand hits.

programme.title: My True Fairytale
programme.desc: Angie Goodwin, 17, along with her best friends, Sarah and Andre, go through a horrific car crash. While her friends miraculously survive, Angie disappears. She decides to fulfill her childhood fantasy and embarks on a mysterious journey.

programme.title: Food for the Heart
programme.desc: After taking on too much with her meal delivery service, Lia accepts her neighbor Eli's help.

programme.title: You, Me, and that Mountain Retreat
programme.desc: Partnered with nature-hating Nathan, Rebecca is put to the test during a work mountain retreat.

programme.title: Midnight Stallion
programme.desc: JACK and his daughter TERESA train a wild horse in hopes of winning enough money to save their farm

programme.title: Eat, Love, London
programme.desc: Stella takes a job at a new London restaurant and ends up falling for the chef.

programme.title: Secret Liaison
programme.desc: A woman travels from Los Angeles to Seattle to try to prevent her sister from going to prison for murder.

programme.title: Angel of Pennsylvania Avenue
programme.desc: Three Depression-era kids ask President Hoover to free their unjustly jailed father (Robert Urich) for Christmas.

programme.title: Northern Borders
programme.desc: Northern Borders is a coming-of-age movie like no other, with Academy Award-nominee Bruce Dern playing a grandfather who takes in his 10 year-old grandson, Austen, at his home in Vermont.

programme.title: Clover
programme.desc: Clover (Zelda Harris) is a precocious ten-year-old black girl living with her widowed father, Gaten (Ernie Hudson), on the family peach orchard in the Deep South. Her aunt, uncle and grandmother all live nearby, so she has never wanted for love.

programme.title: Like a Country Song
programme.desc: Billy Ray Cyrus stars in this tale of humility, forgiveness, and redemption. Jake Reeson is an up and coming country singer who has the whole world in his hands until his ego gets in the way.

programme.title: A Brand New Life
programme.desc: Jin-hee, aged 9, reluctantly enters an orphanage, struggling with feelings of abandonment by her father.

programme.title: Part-time Spy
programme.desc: Government official goes undercover to a phishing group to retrieve budget, where she meets an undercover cop.

programme.title: Kingmaker
programme.desc: Dreaming of changing the world, Seo Chang-dae takes part in Kim Woon-bum's presidential campaign.

programme.title: Exist Within
programme.desc: Eun-soo, an aspiring writer, investigates noisy neighbor Ho-kyung for inspiration, facing a shocking truth.

programme.title: Why She Cries
programme.desc: Sisters are trying to patch up their relationship whilst one is keeping a dark secret from the other. Soon they find out that secrets amongst the average and the affluent are truly not that different, after crossing paths with a wealthy woman dealing with an illness that has caused her husband to be resentful and ashamed of her. Will fate cause them to face the revelation of past hurts and start a journey of forgiveness and healing?

programme.title: The House Guest
programme.desc: A young married couple moves in a female childhood friend who the wife hasn't seen in years. Slowly the house guest starts seducing the ones around her and people start dying. Can anyone stop her before it's too late?

programme.title: The Best Thing!
programme.desc: One day, restaurant owner Justin Alexander's life takes a dramatic turn when he finds out from one of his customers that his deceased ex-girlfriend has a son in the child welfare system. This child is around the age of when Justin and his girlfriend split up. Could this boy be Justin's son? Determined to find out if this kid is his, Justin recognizes being united with this child could have frightening consequences. Or it could be The Best Thing!

programme.title: The 4th Quarter: Legacy
programme.desc: Aging quarterback, Dallas Hughes, returns to the game in a make or break season, after failing to lead his team to the playoffs and the team has drafted his replacement. Set against the backdrop of Atlanta sports, Dallas must come to grips with his future, while putting the pieces back together of his broken family.

programme.title: Weapons of Warfare
programme.desc: When 19 year old TJ, decides to leave the nest of his parents who are preachers of the gospel and turns to the streets for the love and support he always wanted. His life is turned upside down almost over night with gun violence, drug dealings, stolen money and countless crimes in the blink of an eye. His life becomes a tug of war between the parents that raised him and his new gang leader chief Who's bringing him further down to the ground.

programme.title: Train to Busan
programme.desc: As an unidentified virus sweeps the country, Korean government declares martial law. Those on a train to Busan must fight for their own survival. Starring Gong Yoo and Ma Dong-seok. Subtitled.

programme.title: Are You Here
programme.desc: In this touching dramedy, weatherman Steve (Owen Wilson) must join his off-the-grid best friend Ben (Zach Galifianakis) for Ben's estranged father's funeral.

programme.title: A Lover Betrayed
programme.desc: Inspired by true events. A one-night romance with a handsome soldier turns Tess Ford's life upside down as his attraction to her becomes a frightening obsession.

programme.title: The Paperboy
programme.desc: In 1969 Florida, reporter Ward Jansen (Matthew McConaughey) returns to his hometown to write a story about death-row inmate Hillary Van Wetter (John Cusack), who was convicted of murdering a racist lawman. Ward hires his younger brother, Jack (Zac Efron), as a driver and, together with his partner, Yardley (David Oyelowo), gets to work. Though the possibility exists that Van Wetter is innocent, Ward and Yardley unwisely trust a vixen (Nicole Kidman) who will do anything to set the convict free.

programme.title: Danger Zone
programme.desc: Rick Morgan (Billy Zane), an American engineer who runs a mine in East Africa, is approached one day by his friend Jim Scott (Robert Downey Jr.), who needs someplace to store canisters of toxic waste. Unfortunately, a spill occurs a short time later, resulting in deaths and Morgan having to leave the country. A year later, he is approached by a government agent (Ron Silver) looking for a missing supply of potentially hazardous poison, which in truth hides something even more valuable.

programme.title: Shania Twain
programme.sub-title: Still the One: Live from Vegas
programme.desc: The original queen of crossover country-pop Shania Twain invites you to kick up your cowboy boots and sing along to all her biggest hits in her "Shania: Still the One" spectacular. Known as the world's best-selling female country artist of all time, the groundbreaking residency show was filmed live at The Colosseum at Caesars Palace, Las Vegas. She takes audiences on a powerful visual journey through her biggest pop tunes, country favorites and beloved crossover songs. Many of her recognizable favorites stem from "Come On Over," the eighth biggest-selling album of all time. From stallion surprises to her dreamy ballad sequences, be amazed at this stunning songstress' talent. Glamorous costumes, a 13-piece live band, three backup singers (including her sister, Carrie Ann) and six backup dancers add more entertaining layers to the international superstar's first career residency.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Alegría: Mukaddes extraña demasiado a Murat. Kadir y Eve Nine pasan un tiempo solos hablando de su pasado. Fatmagül por fin baja la guardia ante Kerim y se permite disfrutar el momento.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Entre locura y alegría
programme.desc: El padre le dice a Maricruz que Simona ha perdido la razón y José Antonio por fin le regresa a su hija.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Amante
programme.desc: Sofía se pone muy celosa al ver a Francisco borracho y cree que la engaña, pero él trata de convencerla de que no es así. Sanjuana va a buscar a Hilario, pero él la corre y le exige que se aleje de él.

programme.title: Teresa: Vieja amistad
programme.desc: Luisa se encuentra con Lucía, una vieja amiga de la escuela. Arturo le pide a Jacinto vigile a Teresa para saber si sigue o no engañándolo. Rubén está dispuesto a todo para quitarle su hijo a Esperanza.

programme.title: Rubí: Huyendo del amor
programme.desc: Una vez en la oficina, Rubí no pierde momento para coquetearle a Héctor. Alejandro sospecha que Rubí se trae algo entre manos. Héctor empieza a caer en los juegos de seducción de Rubí y descuida ciertas atenciones con Maribel.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Expiando culpas
programme.desc: Leonora visita a Sofía para confirmarle que Juan llegó solo y sin memoria al monte. Juan está a punto de ser trasladado a la prisión de Puebla, pero Sofía retira los cargos en su contra.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Traición en la mira
programme.desc: Alejandro escucha los planes de Mili y Hugo para irse de luna de miel e invita a Florencia a irse de viaje a la playa. Florencia ve a Alejandro besando a Mili. Constancio decide ayudar a Mateo para que se quede con la empresa de Domingo.

programme.title: Vino el amor: Un nuevo compromiso
programme.desc: David le dice a Fernanda que va a oficializar su relación con Graciela. Por otro lado, Marta espera que David le de la oportunidad de cuidar a sus hijos nuevamente.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Matilde le dice a Manuel que siempre lo amará y que está feliz porque se solucionó el problema de Adolfo. Antonia le dice a Rosario que ya está vieja y que es tiempo de dejarle el lugar a una persona más joven.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: María Mercedes es una pobre joven que se encarga de mantener a su familia. Jorge Luis se casa con Diana, pero a la salida de la iglesia su exnovio le dispara.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Santiago buscará la forma de hacer que Malvina no se quede con todo su dinero después de morir. Meche conoce a Jorge Luis de quién se enamora tras haberle pedido dinero.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Gema le dice a Esteban que solo estará con Arturo si él se comporta como un caballero. Sergio le dice a Bella que sabe que está celosa de Natalia porque lo quiere.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Angélica encuentra a Renato con otra mujer y borracho el bebé de Angélica sufre un terrible accidente.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Alicia sufre al saber que debe regresar a casa de Soraya. María idea un plan para evitar que Soraya maltrate a Alicia. Nandito enfrenta a Soraya para pedirle que se aleje de su familia.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Soraya planea todo para que culpen a Nandito de la muerte de la Nana Calixta. María se molesta con Luis Fernando porque continúa bebiendo.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: A Rosario se le otorga la libertad absoluta debido a su buen comportamiento. Meche se enfada con Justa al saber que, por su culpa, golpearon a su hermano.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Magnolia no deja de pensar en sus hijos y promete volver a México para encontrarlos. Meche conoce a Santiago, pero él solo se comporta de manera grosera y la echa de su casa.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: El Dr. Durán invita a Juan Miguel a trabajar con él. Cande encuentra el joyero de Marichuy en la basura. Patricio le exige a Marichuy que se olvide de Juan Miguel. Ana Julia se lleva a Mayita sin avisar, dejando a todos muy angustiados.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Ana Julia llega con Mayita y miente al decir que le había avisado a Cande. Las cirugías de Juan Miguel fracasan, pero el doctor Durán le pide que no se rinda. Ana Julia le miente a Juan Miguel y a Marichuy inventando romances para separarlos.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: María va a buscar a Victoria para pedirle trabajo pero ella la trata muy mal María descubre que Max le mintió y que su nombre no es Fabián.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: Max sigue a María y le pide perdón por haberle mentido. Milagros ayudará a Nati a encontrar a su alma gemela. Antonieta le pide a María que se aleje de Max pues va a sufrir mucho. Max le dice a María que quiere estar con ella y la besa.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: María le cuenta a Nati y Linda que Max solo quería tener intimidad con ella, pero que no la ama. Victoria le pregunta a Osvaldo si ha pensado en estar con otra mujer, él se molesta y le dice que no. Victoria se encela de Linda Sortini.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: Bernarda le prohíbe a Tomasa decirle la verdad sobre Victoria a Juan Pablo. Osvaldo le pide a Victoria que piense un poco en lo que él quiere frente a la prensa. Max le pide perdón a María, la lleva a cenar y ella decide darle una oportunidad.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Ezequiel le dice al almirante que el "Alacrán" era Pedro Medina, el almirante le exige que le diga la verdad a su esposa Carlota y le pide que renuncie a su cargo político. Fabiola transfiere su dinero a la cuenta de Graciela para que esté a salvo.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Adolfo y Ezequiel hacen explotar el coche del almirante Robledo. Amelia le cuenta a Fabiola la verdadera historia de Graciela.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Comprometedora confesión
programme.desc: Pedro le pide un favor a María José para que Alex contrate a Meche. Victoria se enoja cuando descubre que Bruno le salvó la vida a María José a cambio de la presidencia.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Ingrid es enterrada viva
programme.desc: Gabino se escapa del hospital para vengarse de Ingrid. Florencia continúa engañando a todos con su supuesto embarazo.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Amor imposible
programme.desc: Sandra y Felipe preparan todo para festejar su boda. Toledo le confiesa a Valentina el inmenso amor que siente por ella. Isabel es acosada por las presas de la cárcel, quienes le exigen una fuerte cantidad de dinero a cambio de seguridad.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Cambio de imagen
programme.desc: Estefanía le confiesa a Piedad que Paola y Willy son amantes. Carlos Daniel contrata a nueva asistente. Toda la familia queda sorprendida con el cambio de imagen de Estefanía.

programme.title: El manantial: El accidente
programme.desc: Alejandro encuentra el automóvil del padre Salvador y lo salva. Alfonsina va tras Alejandro y Margarita.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Unión y separación
programme.desc: Elisa decide decirle a Leonardo que lo mejor es separarse y no seguir con su amor. Darío le pide a Victoria que se convierta en su aliada. Majo descubre la traición de Clara.

programme.title: La Gata: Fuerte amenaza
programme.desc: Rita echa a Esmeralda de su casa tras golpear a Inés. Esmeralda pasa la noche en la calle y le pide a Rita que la deje regresar. Además, el "italiano" amenaza a Pablo con una pistola y le dice que se aleje de la Gata.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Convencimiento
programme.desc: Cynthia enfurece al saber que Gustavo sigue enamorado de Ana Paula. Macaria entristece al saber que Ulises está cada vez menos interesado en recuperar su matrimonio. Rosaura le ruega a Bruno que convenza a Rogelio que busque a Ana Paula.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica vende zapatos de piel por catálogo y Ludovico se pone muy celoso porque está ganando mucho dinero y decide competir con ella vendiendo ropa interior para mujer, pero es detenido por vender sin permiso.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico y Federica están aprendiendo a usar el chat para conocer gente usando nombres falsos. En el chat, sin darse cuenta. se encuentran entre ellos.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco se va de viaje y Fran encuentra la oportunidad perfecta para ganarse unos dólares alquilando el departamento de su papá a unos viejitos por el fin de semana unas horas más tarde el vuelo de Paco se cancela.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Fran acaba de conocer a Karime y se enamora perdidamente de ella. Sólo hay un pequeño problema: Karime se casa el próximo fin de semana.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Los vecinos se quedan sin gas por no pagar su cuota. Luis es el único que paga su parte, e instala su propio tanque, al que Magda le cierra la llave cuando se baña. Lorena extraña a Benito.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Luis estaciona su carro afuera de su edificio y un franelero quiere cobrarle 20 pesos por cuidar su coche. Luis, Arturo y Germán se enfrentan a los cuidadores de carros, pero no logran que se vayan. Los vecinos hacen una junta.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Hans Pujenhaimer enfurece al ver que uno de los camarógrafos no hace el conteo debido para empezar la grabación. Sammy y Miguel Luis muestran su nueva "Sección Imposible" con el tema del Día de Reyes.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Alz y Heimmer discuten sobre la boda de sus abuelos. En el noticiero "DMS por la noche", los locutores discuten sobre las noticias que exponen. El máximo exponente de la cinematografía, don Oscar, muestra sus mejores películas.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Cipriano elige a Vitor como el empleado del mes y recibe de premio una noche en la suite presidencial del hotel. Vitor es atacado por Chabelita, don Chava lo salva y le dice que todos los huéspedes son zombies.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: El patrón le dice a Cipriano que un reportero va a ir al hotel. Anita cree que el reportero está muerto y un investigador va al hotel, cuando descubren que el reportero no murió, el investigador lo arresta por cometer muchas infracciones.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano es estafado por una mujer que promete volverlo un famoso cantante, pero durante su presentación todos descubren la farsa de su voz.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano y Vítor conocen a dos mujeres que les hacen creer que están interesadas en ellos, pero solo quieren su dinero.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles: Sostengo el pi
programme.desc: La euforia por el feng shui y por limpiar desata un conflicto entre familias. Doña Lucha y María intentan controlar a todos con el feng shui, y organizan un concurso.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía ve un video y se da cuenta que Celina le ha estado mintiendo para salir con un chico. León le advierte a Diego que tiene que ganar las elecciones sí o sí, o lo castigará.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía cuestiona a Celina por no decirle que anda con Alex. Es el día de la votación y gana Diego, pero José está segura de que hicieron fraude. Roberta trata de quejarse pero la castigan y Reverte la consuela, mientras Alma los ve de manera extraña.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel está muy enfermo y Mía lo cuida a pesar de todos los problemas que tienen. Diego engaña a Roberta para llevarla a su departamento y hablar con ella.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Romina se queda a cuidar a Miguel. Gandía pide a Diego, Giovanni y Tomás que encuentren al ladrón de su pluma. Miguel va a la escuela y Gastón lo corre, así que se esconde. Teo va al desfile de las Top Girls y se pelea con José.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego reconoce ante todos que hizo trampa para ganar la Presidencia. Miguel logra meterse a la escuela y habla con Mía. Roberta provoca que se le caiga la falda a Raquel. Mía se presenta en el desfile, modelando y regalando ropa de la marca Colucci.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía y Miguel se reconcilian y le dice que siempre soñó con volver a estar así con él. Rocco le insinúa a Giovanni que ante la careta de machito que tiene, se esconde un gay. Roberta le dice a José que se está haciendo daño.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía se reconcilia con Vico y Celina. Vico enfrenta a Pilar porque se entera de que ella causó su separación de Giovanni. Miguel regresa a la escuela y todos descubren que volvió con Mía. Tomás y Giovanni creen que Roberta y Diego andan a escondidas.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje: Fuerte confesión
programme.desc: Aimeé siente celos al saber que Renato está interesado en Regina. Clemencia le confiesa a Regina que Leonarda es la responsable de la desaparición de María del Rosario. Juan logra encontrar a María del Rosario.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: El Coyote queda impresionado al saber que Soledad es el gran amor de Ricardo. Juan decide vivir en la hacienda con Sofía para poder convencerla de su amor.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Fernando le pide a Gabriela que lo nombre su principal heredero. Juan planea volver a conquistar a Sofía.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Ruth coloca una serpiente en la habitación de las hijas de Sofía. Ricardo intenta abusar de Jimena para llevar a cabo su venganza contra los Elizondo.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Juan le explica a Sofía lo que ocurrió con Ruth. Sarita le confiesa a Óscar que alguien intentó abusar de Jimena. Jimena sospecha que Ricardo es quien intentó abusar de ella. Juan y Sofía les realizan a sus hijas una prueba de ADN.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Julia le reclama a Juan de Dios por haberle ocultado que él embarazó a Mireya. Julia le confiesa a Juan de Dios que Rufino es el padre de Mireya. Josefina descubre que Dinorah era la amante de su marido.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Remedios le confiesa a Julia que Dinorah esperaba un hijo de Fausto antes de casarse. Julia enfrenta a Dinorah para reclamarle por haber sido la causante de la muerte de su madre.

programme.title: Bárbara
programme.desc: Una historia de amor donde los enamorados deben enfrentar diferentes contratiempos para poder estar juntos.

programme.title: Tres Noches de Locura
programme.desc: Tres mujeres experimentan varias aventuras diferentes entre sí y algunas de ellas tienen finales trágicos.

programme.title: La Inocente
programme.desc: La historia de una mujer con problemas mentales que tiene que enfrentar un embarazo.

programme.title: La agonía de ser madre
programme.desc: Una mujer de mediana edad se entera de que sufre una enfermedad cardíaca y que le quedan pocos meses de vida.

programme.title: Víctimas del Divorcio
programme.desc: Un joven cantante se hace amante de una bailarina durante una gira y su esposa quiere divorciarse de él.

programme.title: Fruto prohibido
programme.desc: Una mujer acusa falsamente a su tutor, diciendo que la violó porque está enamorada y quiere casarse con él.

programme.title: Vainilla, bronce y morir
programme.desc: Un hombre recuerda cuando se enamoró de una joven, y le propone fugarse con él pues su padre la quiere casar con otro.

programme.title: En la palma de tu mano
programme.desc: Jaime Karín es un importante astrólogo que utiliza a su esposa, Clara, para obtener información de sus futuras clientas. Ada planea eliminar a su amante, le propone a Karín hacerlo juntos y compartir la herencia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Ángela, una chica paralítica, se vuelve compañera y víctima de Diego y Jorge, quienes se ven envueltos en una aventura peligrosa en la que los involucra Santiago, un compañero que los acosa.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: La Esperanza es lo Último que Muere
programme.desc: Joel está consciente que vive con sus padres adoptivos, pero un día, por un cartel, se entera que su verdadera madre lo está buscando y hace que él empiece a investigar lo que realmente pasó con su adopción.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Por muy larga que sea la noche
programme.desc: Marisol padece cáncer de mama y aún así, Luis, su novio, le propone matrimonio, pero al casarse, empiezan a tener problemas. Pasado el tiempo él decide separarse y esto ocasiona que ella logre encontrar el amor en Alex.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El que ríe último, ríe mejor
programme.desc: Sofía juega con el amor de dos hermanos que se encuentran distanciados por conflictos familiares. La tragedia comienza cuando ellos se dan cuenta de que ambos están enamorados de la misma mujer.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Más Vale Poco y Bien Allegado
programme.desc: Catalina vive con su abuela Leonory, al tener problemas de dinero, opta por incorporarse a la banda de Las Ladies, dirigida por Isaac, los cuales se dedican a robarle a la gente. Esto le ocasiona varios problemas y tendrá que saber enfrentarlos.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Yani y Rigo, hermanos gemelos, fueron separados al nacer, pero ellos siempre han sentido la cercanía uno del otro. Yani descubre unos documentos en la biblioteca de Eduardo, su padre y decide buscar a su hermano, a pesar de que sus padres se oponen.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Rigo está enamorado de Lili, pero el padre de él es un mantenido que se escuda en una enfermedad que tiene para no trabajar. Su mamá se dedica a estafar a la gente para conseguir dinero.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Paty es una chica reprimida por Gloria, su madre, que difícilmente le da libertades y exagera advirtiéndole de los peligros que corre con los chicos. Lo que no se imagina es que se ha vuelto el trofeo de una apuesta entre dos amigos.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: La competencia arranca y los seis talentosos escuadrones comienzan la lucha por alcanzar sus sueños. Los capitales se enfrentan en una divertida prueba de imitación.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Varios talentos de las temporadas anteriores de Pequeños Gigantes regresan para unirse a los participantes y ayudarlos en su prueba de canto.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom sets off in Alaska to check out vintage first-generation Bronco owner Adam McNabb, to discover his collection of various Broncos and assorted off-road delights.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits a remarkable motorcycle collection in Staten Island, NY, filled with Harley-Davidson, Indian, and Vincent motorcycles. The collection is so extensive that it overflows from the garage and basement and even finds its way into the living room and dining room of the house. The motorcycles span from 1910 all the way to 1980. We hope you enjoy this once-in-a-lifetime collection.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Ray Evernham shows Tom his incredible collection of his vintage IROC, Stock Cars, and Modified Cars from the early days of racing. He also has a few surprises up his sleeve which leave Tom speechless.

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: Colin has the pleasure of looking over a rust-free 1966 Dodge Charger from the Arizona desert with all the right factory options.Next, Colin appraises a 1969 Dodge Coronet Super Bee that is an all-original California-built car. Packaged with a 383ci V8 and a factory N96 air grabber hood, Colin thinks this to be an attractive car based on its unique color combo of high-impact F6 metallic green and black interior. But, original cars do come with flaws and Colin found a few in the rear end of the car.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: 90,000sqft or six barns full of dusty, rusty, forgotten treasures from decades of collecting. To name a few, GTOs, Caprices, Firebirds, Blazers, Suburban, Trucks, Jeeps, Broncos, and some pre-war cars. Everything is for sale and everything must go. Message email above, serious inquiries only.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom Cotter gets an exclusive and in-depth tour of the Detroit Historical Society's backroom collection, showcasing priceless Detroit icons. These rare cars are meticulously preserved in climate-controlled bubbles known as car capsules to suspend and slow the aging process so future generations have the opportunity to enjoy them.

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: The Flathead V-8 in this barn find Ford F1 pickup is FILLED with oil sludge. Can Davin and Jeff get it cleaned out enough to get this beauty of a farm truck running again? BONUS FEATURE AT THE END! Watch an incredible time-lapse rebuild of a flathead Ford V8 engine!

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: BIG NEWS: This is the first video in a five-part series featuring a DeTomaso Pantera, a collaboration between "Redline Rebuild" and "Barn Find Hunter". On "Barn Find Hunter," we always uncover cars that have been hidden for years and delve into their fascinating stories. Typically, we are involved in the initial phase of the barn find story, step one. Rarely do we have the privilege of witnessing steps two and three: the exchange of ownership and the restoration. Today is that special day! Tom's son, Brian, has purchased a DeTomaso Pantera that has been frozen in time for nearly 40 years. The Pantera gets loaded onto a flatbed and taken back to the shop for a thorough assessment of its condition, with plans to get the engine running and potentially turn it into our next Redline Rebuild project. Stay tuned for more videos from the Redline Rebuild Team!

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom travels to Michigan to visit Mick, a previous guest on our 'Will it Run' series with Davin Reckow. Mick has a massive collection of Chrysler 'Hemi' cars, rare one-off models, and some celebrity-owned vehicles, specifically, 'The Fonz's' motorcycle.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits Rob Ida's custom car shop, where he checks out his barn-find projects and gets an EXCLUSIVE tour of his one-of-a-kind shop. The best way to explain Rob's shop is not only by calling it a car shop but also an innovation factory. Using the latest technology in metal CNC stretching, 3D printing, and electronic accessories, Rob and his team are setting a new standard for what it means to build custom cars. Follow along as he shows us the latest projects and technology the engineering world has to offer.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: While in St. George, Utah, Tom learns of a junkyard with hundreds of solid old cars, where the owner never sold anything and never allowed anyone inside. Tom makes a few phone calls and sweet-talks his way into Blake's Auto Salvage.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom teams up with his friend Rob Ida to continue the search for cars in New York City. After visiting a few locations, he follows a lead on a late '30s LaSalle, a key piece in a massive collection and one of the best discoveries on the show. Rarely do we come across barn finds in perfect condition that aren't too rusted, yet only need minimal work to get them running. Welcome to this extraordinary collection – 40 barn finds featuring various makes and models, each waiting to be discovered and find new homes.

programme.title: What's For Sale?

programme.title: What's For Sale?

programme.title: What's For Sale?

programme.title: Real Potential

Once Truc and Eric buy, Sarah renovates the one room in their new home that allows them to live larger than ever!

programme.title: What's For Sale?

programme.title: What's For Sale?

programme.title: What's For Sale?

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Drew's News with Tom Green, Cookbook Countdown with Chef Pilar Valdes, New To Drew: Street Golfing

Plus, Drew and Chef Pilar Valdes are counting down the days until the release of their cookbook, “Rebel Homemaker” and whip up Yuzu Kosho Soft Scrambled Eggs. Then, Drew tries street golfing in “New To Drew” with beloved street golfer Tiger Hood.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: "Hey Dude the 90's Called" podcast host and actress Christine Taylor is joining Drew to chat about working together on "The Wedding Singer" and some of her iconic roles in classics like "Dodgeball" and "The Brady Bunch Movie."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Hailee Steinfeld, Chicago Teacher Surprise, Drew's News:Thanksgiving Food News Edition

Plus, Antoinette Bond and her mother-in-law Gloria Bond are settling their cornbread stuffing feud once and for all in a Thanksgiving Dish-Off!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Whoopi Goldberg, “West Side Story” Star Rachel Zegler, Drew's News
programme.desc: “The View” co-host Whoopi Goldberg stops by to chat her new holiday collection. Then, “West Side Story” star Rachel Zegler joins Drew to discuss being cast as Maria and starring in the highly anticipated new movie. Plus, in all new Drew's News, Drew and Ross Mathews serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Martha Stewart, Drew's News with Phil Rosenthal
programme.desc: Martha Stewart stops by to whip up brioche and apple bread pudding, dishes on her thirst traps, the one person she's desperate to meet and shares why she has decided to open-up her Bedford home and gardens in her new shows. "Everybody Loves Raymond" creator and star of "Somebody Feed Phil" Phil Rosenthal joins Drew and Ross Mathews for a special Drew's News: Food News edition.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: Best Of Week, With Hugh Grant, Marie Kondo, Drew-Gooder Surprise
programme.desc: In a season two pre-party event, Drew's sharing her favorite moments from season one all week long, sharing bonus content and behind-the-scenes commentary on what really went down. Drew kicks things off by revisiting behind-the-scenes secrets Hugh Grant revealed while filming some of his famous movies. Then, Drew's dream came true when declutter queen Marie Kondo stopped by to share some of her favorite organizational tips. Plus, Drew has a very special surprise for Drew-Gooder Alicia White who created a non-profit focused on the revitalization and development of underserved communities.

programme.desc: The animals of the ring, The Beast and Jungle Grrrl battle to determine dominance. Meanwhile, WOW World Champion Tessa Blanchard seizes an opportunity to settle a score.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: “The Night of Surprises” - The night of action kicks off with a tag team showdown between Coach Campanelli & Randi Rah Rah and Gigi Gianni & Adriana Gambino whose drama will surprise fans before the bell ever sounds! The Beast makes a surprise visit to the office of David McLane. Jessie Jones confronts Samantha Smart and sets up a match against The Disciplinarian. Sweet Heat, Penelope, and Lana Star have a mysterious new addition to their team. Jessie Jones confronts Samantha Smart and sets up a match against The Disciplinarian. And Leia Mokoa takes on newcomer Wrecking Ball in the night's main event.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Champion Tessa Blanchard and The Greatest Attorney in the World, Sophia Lopez conspire In an attempt to derail The Beast's path to The WOW World Championship Title by placing The Norweigen Nightmare, Nikki Krampus in her way. programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Anticipation builds as Jungle Grrrl gets a rematch against The Beast to determine the rightful contenedor to the WOW World Championship. programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Jungle Grrrl calls out The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard for her Championship Match. programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The Beast calls out The Fabulous Lana Star for costing her a shot at The WOW World Championship. programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In this season's casting special, "Road to the Runway," sixteen new designers will be introduced with a behind-the-scenes look from their casting auditions, home visits, casting submissions, and sit-down interviews. programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In the season premiere, sixteen new designers meet Tim and Heidi at Madison Square Garden, where they scramble across the seats to gather fabric for their first challenge. programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are dealt a big surprise in the first Unconventional Materials Challenge of the season! Each designer must create a wearable look using greeting cards as their main textile. Ashley Tisdale joins the judges.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In the first Team Challenge of the season, the designers are paired up and treated to a day on a Celebrity Cruise ship. For some of the duos, the friendly seas are left behind and they hit some rocky water in the workroom. Tracee Ellis Ross guest judges.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers finally get to go to Mood and they are thrilled! They must put a modern and unique twist on a classic design. Mad Men's Kiernan Shipka joins as a guest judge.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Tensions arise when the designers split into two teams and battle for their fabrics in a fierce paintball competition. programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In an episode full of surprises, Heidi challenges the designers to create lingerie for her line. The exhausted designers get a rude awakening on the runway. Actress Bella Thorne serves as a guest judge.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In their second Unconventional Materials Challenge, the designers go dumpster diving for recycled electronics in order to merge the worlds of fashion and technology. Actress Paula Patton and Editor in Chief of Marie Claire magazine, Anne Fulenwider, guest judge.

Each piece, crafted with a monochromatic palette, reveals the exquisite interplay of light and shadow. From captivating landscapes to evocative portraits, these black and white images evoke a sense of refined elegance, transporting viewers to a realm of tasteful minimalism.
